A.evidence: Clean prose and faithful display/inline LaTeX, but title has 'b y Reducing', 'no toriously' broken, noisy inline cross-ref markup, and Algorithm 1 box rendered as a garbled unresolved \begin{array} blob.

B.evidence: Cleanest prose with no glyph/line-number contamination, correct column reading order, and Algorithm 1's four update formulas each rendered as correct readable LaTeX with inline comments.

C.evidence: Scrambled order (Abstract placed after the second-column 'Using mini-batches' paragraph), raw glyph-name leakage '/lscript' and '/epsilon1' for ell/epsilon, and nearly all display equations dropped as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' including Algorithm 1.

D.evidence: Good prose and correct display equations, but 'Simodaira' misspelling, fragmented inline subscripts like 'x$_{1}$$_{...}$$_{N}$', and Algorithm 1 corrupted (mini-batch mean line missing, variance line duplicated into the normalize step).
